name: Cloudflare
philosophy: An inspired interpretation of Cloudflare's brand language — the global-network infrastructure brand that operationalizes a single chromatic asset: orange. The orange (#f48120) is reserved with monastic discipline for the brand mark and primary CTAs. Canvas is white-to-near-white with cool blue-gray ink. Type runs a precise grotesk (Inter / IBM Plex / proprietary Sans) and the brand projects 'global, infrastructural, calm' — never SaaS-marketing kinetic. The mark — a stylized orange cloud — appears on the navigation; the rest of the page reads as quiet, dense, technical documentation.

design_language.motion_signature: Almost-no-motion. Section reveals fade in over 400ms with no translate. Global-network animations (the signature globe with arc-paths) move at slow 12s loop — calm, infrastructural, never twitchy. Hover states change opacity, never scale.

trademark_signals: Single-asset orange (#f48120) — used only on brand mark, primary CTAs, and the occasional inline highlight; never as a section background, never as a gradient stop with another color
Map-of-the-world hero — the brand's signature is the global network map with arc-paths between data centers, often used as a watermark or full-bleed hero behind a centered headline
Dense technical content blocks with clear semantic hierarchy — sub-headers, monospace code excerpts, tabular data — the brand reads as documentation more than marketing
Cool blue secondary (#003682) for emphasized inline links and chart series — never replaces orange as the primary CTA fill
Generous white-space rhythm with 96–128px section padding — the brand projects 'infrastructure scale' through breathing room, not visual density
ai_slop_avoided: Don't introduce a second saturated color. Orange is the single chromatic asset; emphasis comes from weight and spacing, not a second hue
Don't paint the canvas dark. Cloudflare marketing is light-canvas; only the developer docs pivot to a code-block-heavy treatment with dark snippet wells
Don't animate the network globe to spin fast. The signature motion is slow and constant — 'we are infrastructure', not 'we are demo-reel kinetic'
Don't use display weights below 600. Cloudflare display tiers carry semantic weight via heavy grotesk faces; thin reads as off-brand
Don't decorate with stock vector illustrations. The brand favors the network globe, real data visualizations, and clean photography of data centers — never abstract gradient blobs
